name: Internship Acceptance Letter
html:
Internship Acceptance

Applicant{{ frappe.db.get_value('Internship Application', doc.applicant, 'applicant_name') or doc.applicant }}
Offer Number{{ doc.offer_number or doc.name }}
Acceptance Date{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.response_date or doc.offer_date) }}
Department{{ doc.department }}
Supervisor{{ doc.supervisor }}

I accept the internship offer under the stated terms and conditions.



_____________________
Intern Signature
